description: From the Publisher Gorilla Max Strength Indoor Mounting Tape Gorilla Heavy Duty Mounting Tape Gorilla Mounting Tape XL Gorilla Mounting Tape Squares Gorilla Crystal Clear Double Sided Mounting Tape Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 28,099 4.3 out of 5 stars 28,099 4.3 out of 5 stars 28,099 4.1 out of 5 stars 1,045 4.3 out of 5 stars 28,099 Price £8.15 £ 8 . 15 £7.79 £ 7 . 79 £13.60 £ 13 . 60 £6.80 £ 6 . 80 £5.39 £ 5 . 39 Size 1.5m 1.5m 3.8m 24 pre cut squares 1.5m Best For Permanent Indoor mounting around the home Mounting indoor and out, across rough and smooth surfaces. "2.5x more tape than our 1.5m mounting tape. Grips rough & smooth surfaces with ease, indoor & out." Easy to apply pre-cut double sided squares that lends itself to a wide range of projects and crafts. With the same strong, permanent bond of our Crystal Clear Double Sided Mounting Tape. Mounts a wide range of materials with a strong, permanent bond. Grips rough & smooth surfaces with ease, indoor & out. Resistant to heat, sun & water X ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Key Features Hand tearable, heavy duty double sided tape for permanent bonds inside the home Heavy duty double sided tape for bonds indoor & out. 2.5x longer than Mounting Tape Clear 24 double sided pre cut squares for quick application & bonding High strength double sided crystal clear tape for fast and easy permanent bonds indoor and out Bonds Glass, metal, stone, wood, plastics*, ceramic and more. *not suitable for polypropylene (PP) or polyethylene (PE) plastics.
